notes: Mostly rural/suburban facilities. Too small for colocated DC: insufficient load and buffer.
Typical small-city plants (50-300k population). Buffer often <10 acres.
Marginal AI-DC band. Buffer 7-15 acres; 1-2 MW colocated DC feasible.
AI-inference sweet spot. 15-30 acres buffer; 2-6 MW DC amortizes cleanly.
Large urban plants. 40+ acres; 6-15 MW DC feasible. Interconnection already medium-voltage.
Metro-tier (Houston, Chicago, LA, NYC). Can host AI campus tier (>15 MW). Higher scrutiny.
